api.name: SpeedDial

examples.title: Basic Speed Dial (Bottom Right)
examples.code:
<SpeedDial Items="@_actions" />

@code {
    private List<SpeedDial.SpeedDialItem> _actions = new()
    {
        new() { Label = "New Document", Icon = "📄" },
        new() { Label = "Upload File", Icon = "📁" },
        new() { Label = "Add Reminder", Icon = "🔔" },
    };
}

mdSummary:
# SpeedDial

Floating action button that fans out sub-actions.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/speed-dial

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| SpeedDial | Items | `List<SpeedDialItem>` | `new()` |  |
| SpeedDial | Icon | `string?` | `` |  |
| SpeedDial | Position | `SpeedDialPosition` | `SpeedDialPosition.BottomRight` |  |
| SpeedDial | Direction | `SpeedDialDirection` | `SpeedDialDirection.Up` |  |
| SpeedDial | Variant | `string` | `"Default"` |  |
| SpeedDial | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| SpeedDial | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SpeedDial | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
